member.name: T:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager
member.summary: Manages the multi-stage generation pipeline for a cluster of chunks. Coordinates queuing, concurrent processing, and state transitions across the lifecycle.

member.name: F:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ErrorThrown
member.summary: Invoked when an error occurs during chunk processing. The string parameter contains a human-readable error message including the chunk position.

member.name: F:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.chunksFailed
member.summary: Chunks that encountered an unrecoverable error during any processing stage. Thread-safe; written from task continuations.

member.name: F:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.chunkProcessingByPos
member.summary:
Tracks all chunks currently in the pipeline, keyed by position. Entries are added via and removed when a chunk reaches
or is evicted via .

member.name: T:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.CancelationCondition
member.summary:
A predicate evaluated during
to allow the caller to signal early termination of the current processing pass.

member.name: T:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ChunkTask
member.summary: Pairs an in-flight with the chunk position it is processing, allowing completion checks and state advancement without awaiting inline.

member.name: P:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ChunksCalculatingPoints
member.summary: Read-only view of chunks currently executing the point calculation stage.

member.name: P:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ChunksCalculatingNeighborPoints
member.summary: Read-only view of chunks currently executing the neighbor point calculation stage.

member.name: P:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ChunksRendering
member.summary: Read-only view of chunks currently executing the render stage.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.#ctor(GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.IChunkProcessor,System.Int32)
member.param: The processor implementation that executes each pipeline stage. Determines whether stages run synchronously or on background threads.
Maximum number of chunks that may be actively processing concurrently across all stages.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.OnChunkAdded(Silk.NET.Maths.Vector3D{System.Int32})
member.summary: Registers a chunk at into the pipeline at . No-ops if the chunk is already tracked.
member.param: The world position of the chunk to register.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.OnChunkRemoved(Silk.NET.Maths.Vector3D{System.Int32})
member.summary:
Evicts a chunk at from the pipeline, removing it from all pending queues. Chunks that are already in-flight are allowed to complete but their results are discarded during the next
pass. No-ops if the chunk is not tracked.
member.param: The world position of the chunk to evict.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ProcessChunks(GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.CancelationCondition)
member.summary: Performs one full pass of the generation pipeline: advances completed tasks to their next stage, then queues new work up to the concurrency limit. Rendering is prioritised over neighbor calculation, which is prioritised over point calculation. Returns early at any point if becomes true.
member.param: Called before and after state updates to allow the caller to abort mid-pass.
